description: Audit log of IoT fault dispatch assignments. Each record represents one technician assignment to one IoT sensor fault. The dispatch agent queries this table to suppress duplicate dispatches while a fault is still open.

columns.description: Auto-generated unique dispatch identifier in the format DISP-{YYYY}-{SEQNUM:5} (e.g. DISP-2026-00001).
The technician assigned to this dispatch. Created via relationship andy_technician_dispatchhistory.
The IoT sensor that triggered this dispatch. Created via relationship andy_iotsensor_dispatchhistory.
Lifecycle status of this dispatch. Open = active assignment in progress. The duplicate-guard checks for Open records.
UTC timestamp when this dispatch assignment was created.
UTC timestamp when the technician marked the fault resolved. Null while status is Open.
Error code received from the IoT device payload at time of dispatch (e.g. LED_MISMATCH).
Full error description from the IoT device payload at time of dispatch.
